sql_array: CREATE TABLE distances (id UInt32, vector1 Array(Float64), vector2 Array(Float64), p Float64);
UPDATE distances SET p = 1.0 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, LpDistance(vector1, vector2, p) AS distance FROM distances WHERE p > 1.0;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM distances WHERE LpDistance(vector1, vector2, p) < 5.0;
